description_long: This sculpture depicts two life-sized human figures standing closely together on a rectangular plinth. The figure on the left is a woman draped in classical robes, her hair styled in an ancient fashion, gently holding the hand of the figure on the right. The right figure is a man dressed in Roman-style armor, complete with a helmet adorned with a plume, a short tunic, and sandals. The woman’s posture is graceful, with her head turned toward the man, while the man stands confidently, his left arm around her back. The drapery of the woman's garment is intricately carved, showing fine folds and realistic texture, while the man's armor features detailed relief work. The entire sculpture is rendered in a white or light gray stone, giving it a timeless, classical appearance.
description: A classical-style sculpture of a robed woman and an armored man standing together on a rectangular base, rendered in white stone with detailed drapery and armor.
description_view_0: Front view showing both figures facing each other, with the woman's hand gently holding the man's and their facial expressions visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the figures, the man's armor, and the woman's flowing robes from the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back details of the woman's drapery and the man's armor, with their arms around each other.
description_view_3: Angled rear view focusing on the woman's back and hair, with the man's helmet plume visible.
attribute_subject_matter: two classical human figures, one female and one male in Roman armor
attribute_location_context: No visible context; the sculpture is isolated on a plain background.
